name: 蛋白质合成
subject: biology
domain_name: 遗传与进化 / Genetics & Evolution / Genetics & Evolution
curriculum_points: HS-LS1-1: Construct an explanation based on evidence for how the structure of DNA determines the structure of proteins, which carry out the essential functions of life through systems of specialized cells.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「蛋白质合成」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-LS1-1: Construct an explanation based on evidence for how the structure of DNA determines the structure of proteins, …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。
